sources.writer_profile: Gastronomy and travel journalist who contributes to Guía Repsol, Spain's most authoritative restaurant and travel guide. Her November 2024 pintxos route along Calle del Laurel draws on first-hand visits to each bar, identifying the signature bite at every stop. Guía Repsol carries Spain's Sol rating system and is the primary reference for Spanish dining.
sources.article_title: Ruta de pinchos por la calle Laurel de Logroño

sources.writer_profile: Charlie Brown is the sole creator of The Sauce Mag, a Substack-based food and travel publication documenting eating adventures across Europe and beyond. His July 2024 piece on Logroño emerged from an extended week of eating and drinking in the city, producing bar-by-bar recommendations built around what to order at each stop. The Sauce Mag is a confirmed single-author publication.
sources.article_title: When It Comes to Tapas, Logroño > San Sebastian

sources.writer_profile: ⚠ coi — David Farley is an American food and travel journalist whose work appears in The New York Times, National Geographic, and other major publications. His July 2024 guide to Calle del Laurel was published on the Devour Tours platform, a company that operates food tours in Logroño; the content was produced in the context of a commercial partnership. Farley's editorial detail is substantive, but the commercial conflict is noted.
sources.article_title: 9 Best Pinchos & Tapas on Calle del Laurel in Logroño
sources.commercial_conflict_note: Devour Tours operates food tours in Logroño — content on this platform promotes venues aligned with commercial tour interests.

sources.writer_profile: José Carlos Capel is Spain's most prominent food critic, co-founder of Madrid Fusión and long-time restaurant columnist for El País. His June 2024 review of Arsa — a newly opened Rioja-Andalucía fusion restaurant in Logroño — represents the highest-profile critical assessment an emerging local restaurant can receive. Capel consistently names specific dishes, techniques, and his own evaluative responses.

Teresa Pérez de Azpillaga is a journalist at NueveCuatroUno, a La Rioja-based digital news outlet covering local culture, food, and city life in Logroño. Her March 2026 piece on new hospitality openings provides current coverage of the evolving Logroño restaurant scene from a local press perspective.
sources.article_title: Seis nuevos proyectos a la vista en la hostelería logroñesa

sources.writer_profile: Helena Crespo is a travel writer who contributes to eldiario.es, a Spanish independent national news outlet. Her September 2023 article covering La Rioja's best restaurants takes a visitor-facing regional perspective; the sole Logroño entry extracted was subsequently removed in Phase 3 due to a quote citing TripAdvisor rather than the writer's own observation.
sources.article_title: Los ocho mejores restaurantes de La Rioja

restaurants.name: Bar El Muro
restaurants.quote: Un mollete de pan relleno de picadillo de chorizo, con una tira de pimiento rojo encima y coronado por un huevo de codorniz
restaurants.article_title: Ruta de pinchos por la calle Laurel de Logroño

restaurants.name: Bar Soriano
dishes_mentioned: grilled mushrooms and prawn on baguette
restaurants.signature_dish: Champis — trio of mushrooms with prawn on baguette in garlic oil
restaurants.quote: A trio of local mushrooms topped with a tiny prawn is skewered onto a slice of baguette and covered in an unholy amount of garlic oil
restaurants.article_title: When It Comes to Tapas, Logroño > San Sebastian

restaurants.name: Arsa
dishes_mentioned: duxelles de champiñones con espuma de gambas
buñuelo de orejas guisadas con alioli de alegrías riojanas
salmorejo de naranja sobre tartar de atún
berenjena glaseada con garbanzos y queso de sierra de Cameros
rodaballo en terrina con pil pil de algas
lomo de ciervo marinado con arrope de granadas
restaurants.signature_dish: Paté en costra riojano-andaluz con cerdo ibérico, cordero y foie gras al palo cortado
restaurants.quote: Paté en costra riojano-andaluz que incluye tropezones de cerdo ibérico, cordero y foie gras al aroma del palo cortado

restaurants.name: Bar Ángel
dishes_mentioned: champiñones a la plancha con gamba
restaurants.signature_dish: Champiñones a la plancha con alioli y gamba
restaurants.quote: Con un aliño cercano al alioli hecho a base de aceite de oliva, ajo y, como no, ese ingrediente que no se revela, esta delicia se cocina en la plancha y se remata con una gamba

restaurants.name: Bar El Perchas
restaurants.quote: an orejita picante (a spicy little pig ear sandwich). It's more tender than its battered brethren

dishes_mentioned: sausage in bun with salsa verde
